allies.rationale_text: Scaffolding helps habit-formation turn a hard routine into smaller repeatable units that can actually stick.
Checklists help habit-formation preserve reliable baseline behavior when attention is thin.
allies.source_quote: preserve reliability under stress or limited attention

structured_tensions.tension_text: Habit-formation conflicts with deliberate-practice when conscious skill refinement gets replaced by automatic repetition too early.
Habit-formation conflicts with confirmation-bias when entrenched routines filter evidence to protect the habit instead of the goal.
